team_name: AI-Driven Two-Way Interoperability Layer for Government Service Synchronization
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests both ways between Karnataka's Single Window System and the legacy department systems, using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key.
key_steps: Detect changes using APIs, webhooks, or polling
optimization_claims: Non-intrusive layer that operates without modifying any existing systems
Compatible with masked or synthetic data environments
